build.nonnegative_proof: valid task013 inputs contain two markers at coordinates a,b on the long axis; P=a+b and d=sqrt(2(a^2+b^2)-(a+b)^2)=|a-b|, so p0x2_h=P-d=2*min(a,b)>=0
valid task090 inputs have a nonempty selected maximum rectangle; selected_run is a positive integer bitset and lowbit=run&-run is a positive power of two, so both logarithms are finite nonnegative
rowq=floor(mega_local/30) and col=mega_local mod 30 with mega_local in [0,899]; m2 is a sum of nonnegative decoded values

ysr/ysc are Einsum sums of the nonnegative one-hot input, a 0/1 selector, and coordinate vector [0..29], followed by Cast; pclog logs pball&-pball, a positive power of two because each valid continuous creature has at least four pixels
qseq_high_f16 is fmod=1 of nonnegative float16 values emitted by a uint8 QLinearConv rank pipeline, so its reachable values are nonnegative (in practice 0 or 1) and never negative zero
